---
title: "Open Source Projects"
pagetitle: "Projects | Anthony Faustine"
description-meta: "Open-source ML libraries for forecasting, load monitoring, and production machine learning systems."

format:
  html:
    body-class: "projects"
    page-layout: full

toc: false
---

<style>
.projects-container {
  max-width: 900px;
  margin: 3rem auto;
  padding: 0 1rem;
}

.projects-header {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.projects-header h1 {
  font-size: 2.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #222;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0;
}

.projects-header p {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #666;
  margin: 0;
}

.projects-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 1.5rem;
}

.project-card {
  background: #fff;
  border-left: 4px solid;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.project-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.project-card.status-active {
  border-left-color: #2196F3;
}

.project-card.status-maintained {
  border-left-color: #9C27B0;
}

.project-card.status-community {
  border-left-color: #4CAF50;
}

.project-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.project-title {
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #222;
  margin: 0;
  flex: 1;
}

.project-year {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #999;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.project-meta {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #888;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.project-meta span {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.25rem;
}

.project-status {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.status-active {
  background: #E3F2FD;
  color: #2196F3;
}

.status-maintained {
  background: #F3E5F5;
  color: #9C27B0;
}

.status-community {
  background: #E8F5E9;
  color: #4CAF50;
}

.project-description {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
  color: #555;
  margin: 0.75rem 0;
}

.project-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  padding-top: 1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
}

.project-link {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
  background: #f5f5f5;
  border-radius: 4px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #2196F3;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
}

.project-link:hover {
  background: #2196F3;
  color: #fff;
  border-color: #2196F3;
}

.project-link i {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .projects-container {
    margin: 2rem auto;
  }

  .projects-header h1 {
    font-size: 1.8rem;
  }

  .project-header {
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .project-year {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="projects-container">

<div class="projects-header">

## Open Source Projects

Production-grade ML libraries from research to enterprise

</div>

<div class="projects-grid">

```{r projects, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
library(yaml)
projects_data <- yaml::read_yaml("data.yml")

for (proj in projects_data$projects) {
  status_class <- tolower(proj$status)
  status_badge <- switch(proj$status,
    "Active" = "🚀 Active",
    "Maintained" = "⚙️ Maintained",
    "Community" = "👥 Community",
    "Active"
  )

  cat(sprintf('<div class="project-card status-%s">\n', status_class))
  cat('<div class="project-header">\n')
  cat(sprintf('<h3 class="project-title">%s</h3>\n', proj$name))
  cat(sprintf('<div class="project-year">%d</div>\n', proj$year))
  cat('</div>\n')

  cat(sprintf('<div class="project-meta">\n'))
  cat(sprintf('<span><strong class="project-status status-%s">%s</strong></span>\n', status_class, status_badge))
  cat(sprintf('<span>Updated: %s</span>\n', proj$updated))
  cat('</div>\n')

  cat(sprintf('<p class="project-description">%s</p>\n', proj$description))

  cat('<div class="project-links">\n')
  for (link in proj$links) {
    cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="project-link" title="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-%s"></i> %s</a>\n',
                link$url, link$label, link$icon, link$label))
  }

  if (!is.null(proj$paper)) {
    cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="project-link" title="View Paper" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-file-pdf"></i> Paper</a>\n',
                proj$paper$url))
  }

  cat('</div>\n')
  cat('</div>\n\n')
}
```

</div>

</div>

---

## Contributing

These projects welcome contributions and collaboration.

[Open an Issue](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm} [Submit a PR](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
